name: Turtle and Ham Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the ham into bits and mash the herbs and seasonings together.
2. Set aside the mashed mixture.
3. Boil the turtle meat for 15 minutes, then remove from heat and save the stock.
4. Chop the cooked turtle meat.
5. Brown the onions in lard or vegetable oil until golden brown.
6. Add the chopped turtle meat to the pan and cook until well browned.
7. Add the ham bits and mashed herbs/seasonings, stirring constantly.
8. Add the reserved stock and 2-1/2 to 3 quarts of water, along with salt and various peppers (to taste).
9. Add the finely chopped lemon slices and stir frequently.
10. Cook for an hour or until tender.
Note: Types of turtle include Softshell, snapper (Loggerhead or Alligator), or Mobilian. You can also substitute alligator meat for the turtle.
